items.title: Workflow YAML Authoring Tutorial
items.description: Learn how to write Specflow agentflow YAML and turn agent work into visible, reusable workflows.

items.title: Specflow Commands
items.description: Learn what specflow, specflow validate, and specflow run do, and how to pass workflow inputs.

items.title: Workspace Files
items.description: Learn how workflows, canvas files, agent servers, run records, logs, caches, and assets are stored in a Specflow workspace.

items.title: Aflow Agent Tutorial
items.description: Learn how to use Aflow Agent to create, adapt, validate, run, and resume Specflow workflows.

items.title: Designer Tutorial
items.description: Learn how to use Designer mode to create UI design projects, preview HTML or React frames, attach references, and record versions.

items.title: Workflow YAML 编写教程
items.description: 学习如何编写 Specflow agentflow YAML，把 Agent 工作沉淀为可见、可复用的工作流。

items.title: Specflow 命令
items.description: 学习 specflow、specflow validate 和 specflow run 的用途与输入规则。

items.title: Workspace 文件
items.description: 了解 Specflow workspace 中 workflow、canvas、agent server、运行记录、日志、缓存和资源文件的作用。

items.title: Aflow Agent 使用教程
items.description: 学习如何用 Aflow Agent 创建、改写、校验、运行和恢复 Specflow workflows。

items.title: Designer 使用教程
items.description: 学习如何使用 Designer 模式创建 UI 设计项目、预览 HTML 或 React frame、附加 reference 并记录版本。
